description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find 2025 Silver health plans for ZIP 60601 with individual deductibles under $2,000 and adult dental coverage, sort by monthly premium from low to high, and save the lowest-premium plan.

tasks.instruction: For ZIP 10001 in coverage year 2025, compare two Gold plans using an annual cost estimate for a scenario with 3 primary care visits, 2 specialist visits, and 1 emergency room visit, and mark as preferred the plan with the lower estimated annual cost.

tasks.instruction: Search for in-network primary care providers within 5 miles of ZIP 30301 who are accepting new patients and have ratings of at least 4.5 stars, sort by office visit copay from low to high, and add the provider with the lowest copay to favorites.

tasks.instruction: Using your plan’s cost estimator for ZIP 75201 within 10 miles, compare one hospital and one imaging center for a knee MRI without contrast, then save as preferred the facility with the lower total estimated cost.

tasks.instruction: Browse Bronze plans and their mental health benefits, then add to your shortlist the first plan where the outpatient therapy visit copay shown is $30 or less when sorted by that copay from low to high.

tasks.instruction: In the HSA calculator, select a high-deductible health plan, adjust the monthly HSA contribution until the annual contribution is exactly $1,800 for self-only coverage, and save this HSA setup with a note.

tasks.instruction: Using the prescription price tool for your current plan, look up generic atorvastatin 10 mg tablets for a 30-day supply of 30 tablets within 10 miles of ZIP 85001, sort pharmacies by your estimated cost from low to high, and set the lowest-cost pharmacy as preferred.
